reviews.text:
Lisa is a true artist! Passionate about her work and craft, her creativity is abundant. Her professionalism at events is unparalleled. She did an amazing job photographing our wedding!  At our rehearsal dinner she captured the most memorable moments that only a true professional and creative person can do!

Her black and white rock and roll photography is far beyond excellent, with such an incredible portfolio that seems endless with so many popular musicians. It leaves one in astonishment. The perfection of the film, light and the moment can make you almost feel and hear the music. Her images are far beyond any typical photograph.

Her Lumin project has stunning portraits of real people that show her deep connection to her artistic vision. This is an amazing example of her boundless imagination and connection to the world, art and expression.

She has dedicated her life to exploring and capturing the many facets of life through photography and she shows up so naturally that anyone being photographed can just relax and be themselves.
Lisa is a fantastic photographer! Her vast experience shooting live performances. weddings/ gatherings of all sorts, gives her a unique eye. She is incredible at capturing the special moments.

Lisa is an amazing photographer that is also wonderful to work with! On the day of our engagement photos there was smoke in the air and very windy. I thought oh no we will probably have to reschedule. When we got on location Lisa snapped the photos quickly and we got amazing shots regardless of the weather. My husband and I really enjoyed working with Lisa and hired her for all of our elopement, and celebration photos. Every photo is breathtaking!

Dog Daze Photo has been our go-to for graduation pictures for over five years, and we couldn’t be happier! She is amazing—fantastic with the kids, professional, and efficient. Her turnaround time is quick, and the photos are easy to share with parents, making the entire process seamless. I highly recommend her for all your photography needs!

I wish I could give Lisa from Dog Daze Photos more than 5 stars! She is truly the most amazing photographer I have ever worked with. Lisa has an incredible ability to capture a moment in time so vividly that you can almost feel the air and smell the atmosphere just by looking at her photos.

We have used her for our daughter's senior pictures and modeling digitals, and if I could go back in time, I would have had her photograph every milestone—just to hold onto those memories forever. Her work is nothing short of breathtaking. From weddings and boudoir sessions to rock music shoots and beyond, EVERY SINGLE PHOTO is a masterpiece.

What truly sets Lisa apart is not just her talent behind the camera but the way she makes her subjects feel—confident, beautiful, and completely at ease. Her style is unique, unlike any other, and her ability to bring out the best in every person she photographs is unmatched.

If you're looking for a photographer for your wedding, baby celebration, graduation, family gathering, or simply want stunning photos that make you feel incredible, Lisa is the one to call. You get far more than you pay for, and I can't recommend her enough. You will be beyond happy with her work!
